diagnosis: Cloudflare tunnel routed all /api/fishit-tracker/* GET reads to ingest (8792), which only mounts upload POST routes. /tracker polled get-backpack on that path and received 502/404 while /api/tracker/get-backpack on web (8791) had hydrated data.
rootCause: aio subdomain migration + broad cloudflared path ^/api/fishit-tracker/.* → 8792

fix.frontendImagePath: /api/tracker/image/:assetId (with trackerReadPath rewrite for API-returned asset URLs)
fix.backend: registerTrackerWebReadAliases() mirrors GET /api/fishit-tracker/* onto /api/tracker/* on web router
fix.cloudflaredReference: config/cloudflared-ingress.reference.yml narrowed to POST upload paths only

GET /api/fishit-tracker/get-backpack/den.note: still hits ingest until CF dashboard applies narrowed rules

uiProof.tableCells: Numbers or em dash (EMPTY_STAT); no 'Waiting for snapshot' in table bundle

cloudflareActionRequired: Apply narrowed ingress rules from config/cloudflared-ingress.reference.yml in Zero Trust dashboard so GET /api/fishit-tracker/* also serves from web until legacy clients migrate
